central_banks.fed: The Federal Reserve held rates steady at 4.25-4.50% at its June meeting. Chair Powell noted inflation remains elevated but the labor market is cooling. Markets are pricing in one rate cut by September.
central_banks.boc: The Bank of Canada held its overnight rate at 3.25% in June. Governor Macklem highlighted that while core inflation is trending toward the 2% target, shelter costs remain sticky.

Environmental Tectonics GAAP EPS of $0.15, revenue of $62.7M

geopolitical.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
geopolitical.summary: The deal which will pave the way for hostilities to end is close to being finalised, the US, Iran and mediators Pakistan say.

geopolitical.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
geopolitical.summary: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

geopolitical.title: French town buries murdered child as questions mount over police failings
geopolitical.summary: The prime suspect in the killing of Lyhanna, 11, was reported to police nine months prior but never questioned.

geopolitical.title: Discovery of €1.2m jewellery prompts fresh probe into former Spanish PM
geopolitical.summary: José Luis Rodriguez Zapatero is suspected of being unable to show proof he paid import duties on the jewellery.

geopolitical.title: Fans on concourses instead of in seats, claims Fifa
geopolitical.summary: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.

geopolitical.title: Taylor Swift makes tearful 21-minute speech as she joins Songwriters Hall of Fame
geopolitical.summary: The singer thanks her family as she becomes the youngest woman to be inducted into the Hall of Fame.

geopolitical.title: A Family Ravaged by Land Mines in Myanmar
geopolitical.summary: Bu Ri lost a leg to a mine in Myanmar decades ago. More recently, six other members of his family have suffered a similar fate or worse, in a sign of the devastation wreaked by civil war.

geopolitical.title: Should Switzerland Cap Its Population at 10 Million? Voters Will Decide.
geopolitical.summary: One of the world’s richest countries is about to hold a referendum on a measure that would curb migration and most likely the economy. It is being sold in warm tones.

geopolitical.title: Cease-Fire Deal Appears Within Reach, Officials Say
geopolitical.summary: U.S. and Iranian officials said final details were still being worked out, but President Trump and Iran’s foreign minister both said they were close to an agreement. Previous potential deals have evaporated at the last minute.

geopolitical.title: U.S. Plan Is Said to Pull a Third of Fighter Jets It Provides NATO for Europe
geopolitical.summary: The plan, outlined by officials and in a written document, provides rare clarity about the extent to which the Trump administration intends to reduce its commitment to NATO.
